marketRegime.label: Sideways
marketRegime.explanation: Signals are mixed, so the skill waits for cleaner confirmation before approving a new trade.

rules.entry: Do not enter until trend, momentum, volatility, and sentiment guards align; re-evaluate on the next 4H candle close.
rules.exit: Exit when price closes below the 20 EMA (586.90) or MACD flips bearish on the 4H chart.
rules.stopLoss: No new stop is proposed because no new entry is approved.
rules.positionSizing: Keep simulated allocation at 0% until trend, momentum, volatility, and sentiment conditions improve.

blockedReasons: Momentum quality: Momentum is stretched or turning against the setup.
Sentiment risk: Fear & Greed is in an extreme zone.

checks.label: Trend confirmation
checks.detail: BNB is trading above the EMA stack.

checks.label: Momentum quality
checks.detail: Momentum is stretched or turning against the setup.

checks.label: Volatility control
checks.detail: ATR is within an acceptable range for simulated stop sizing.

checks.label: Sentiment risk
checks.detail: Fear & Greed is in an extreme zone.

checks.label: Backtest drawdown
checks.detail: Recent simulated drawdown stays inside the risk cap.

riskGuard.principle: No trade is also a valid strategy.

safetyConstraints: Market and backtest outputs are for strategy testing only.

dataSource.note: BNB quote and Fear & Greed are loaded from CoinMarketCap REST API. RSI, MACD, EMA, ATR, and the backtest are calculated from live candles (OKX public fallback because CMC OHLCV was unavailable for this key/plan).
